task_description: GeoUMKM Intelligence v4.0 Phase 1: Reorganize project structure, build premium landing page with Next.js 14 + Tailwind + Framer Motion, create dashboard skeleton pages, write comprehensive Azure setup documentation, and update CI/CD workflow
